title: Vayalār Heat Wave
lead: Vayalār is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.11. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vayalār are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 83% and a Vento of 12.5 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 9.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are likely to be severely impacted by this extreme weather event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Vayalār.
